overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a character in ornate armor exploring the Ravenclaw common room. The character ascends stone staircases through gothic archways, enters a grand circular library with blue and gold decor, and explores study areas with towering bookshelves and students in wizard robes.

events.description: passing through the arched doorway into the grand entry hall
entering the brighter grand hall with natural light filtering from above

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone staircase toward the eagle-decorated doorway

entered.detail: wide stone steps with dark wooden railings on both sides
large golden eagle sculpture mounted above the arched doorway
gothic stone archway with wooden double doors
lit wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination
enormous stone eagle carving on the far wall of the entry hall
dark painted ceiling with golden stars and constellations

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase flanked by wooden railings and wall sconces, passing through a gothic arched doorway topped with a golden eagle statue. Upon entering the grand hall, the space opens to reveal a massive stone eagle sculpture on the far wall beneath a starry painted ceiling.

events.description: transitioning from stone steps to carpeted spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: following another student up the curved staircase with tall gothic windows

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the stairs ahead while carrying a broom

tall arched windows with diamond-patterned glass panes
long blue and gold house banners hanging from the walls
grey stone block walls curving with the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character follows a student up a curved staircase carpeted in purple, with tall gothic windows allowing natural light to filter in. Blue and gold banners hang along the stone walls as the staircase spirals upward, leaving the grand entry hall behind.

events.description: entering the circular common room from the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the circular common room past groups of students conversing

elaborate hanging light fixture with multiple candles
circular rug with intricate gold and blue patterns
heavy blue curtains with gold trim framing the windows
classical stone figures on pedestals flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the staircase, the character enters a spacious circular common room with a high domed ceiling. Groups of students in wizard robes stand conversing on the purple patterned carpet, while others relax on velvet sofas beneath an ornate chandelier.

events.description: passing through archway from carpeted area to wooden-floored study room
passing by suit of armor displays flanking the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the study area past decorative suits of armor toward the library section

notable_agents.action: students gathered near the back of the study area

entered.detail: polished dark wooden planks covering the floor
full plate armor statues standing on wooden platforms
stairs leading to an upper level with wooden railings
large ornate wooden fireplace visible in the distance
tall wooden shelves filled with books lining the walls

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the carpeted common room through an archway into a study area with polished wooden floors. Suits of armor stand guard on either side as the character approaches a large central fireplace structure, with bookshelves visible along the walls.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a bright library illuminated by tall gothic windows. Floor-to-ceiling bookshelves line the right wall, while study desks, a large globe, and a leather armchair furnish the space. A telescope stands by the window overlooking the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common room with fireplace and starry ceiling

events.description: character looks up to view the detailed starry ceiling mural

agents.ego_description: looking up at the starry ceiling mural then approaching the central fireplace where a figure stands

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back wall featuring a massive blue eagle tapestry, then looks up at the detailed starry ceiling with wooden beams. Moving toward the central fireplace with burning flames, the character passes students sitting on sofas and ends near the mantelpiece where a figure stands by the fire.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gothic entryway through a spiraling ascent and into the expansive, ornate heart of the Ravenclaw common room. It begins as the character climbs a stone staircase and passes under a golden eagle statue, emerging into a grand hall dominated by a massive stone eagle and a starry ceiling. As the camera follows a student upward, the scene shifts to a purple-carpeted curved staircase where natural light filters through tall gothic windows and blue and gold banners line the walls. The movement then opens into a spacious circular common room with a high domed ceiling, where students gather on velvet sofas beneath an ornate chandelier. Finally, the character moves through an archway from the carpeted area onto polished wooden floors, passing suits of armor toward a large central fireplace and towering bookshelves.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright, scholarly library that transitions into a cozy, firelit gathering space. It begins as the character enters a room illuminated by tall gothic windows, passing by floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, study desks, and a telescope overlooking the exterior. As the camera advances, the focus shifts toward the back wall featuring a massive blue eagle tapestry before tilting upward to reveal a detailed starry ceiling supported by wooden beams. The scene then moves toward the warmth of a central fireplace, gliding past students resting on sofas before finally coming to a stop near the mantelpiece where a figure stands by the burning flames.
